title: Mesh – Festival of Art and Technology – Freilager-Platz Münchenstein / Basel
infos:
Mesh 
 Festival of Art and Technology 
 Freilager-Platz Münchenstein / Basel
headline:
The next Mesh Festival will take place from 
 14 to 16 October 2026 on Freilager-Platz in Münchenstein.
statementContent:
The second edition, "urban actions | spatial utopias", our focus will be on the spatial effects of digital spaces. The immersive design of public spaces and, in particular, the overlapping of virtual and physical space will take central stage. 
 The festival will explore what digital spatial utopias can be - visions in which smart city concepts and vertical cities not only enable technical innovations, but also the transformation of urban living spaces into healthy, sustainable and democratic ecosystems. 
 How can we make the city more people friendly and at the same time meet the challenges of global dominance and digital colonisation by technology companies as well as utopias that have already been realised, such as in Abu Dhabi or artificial island projects? 
 With an approach that distinguishes between reconstruction and construction, the festival focuses on initiatives that spotlight healthy living spaces. What actions are already taking place today and what visions and utopias characterise the discourse on our living spaces?
newsletterContent:
Subscribe to our newsletter 
 and stay tuned.

openCallContent: Mesh Festival is inviting the international art and tech community to submit proposals for presentations and workshops at the Mesh conference. The two-day conference will be held during the festival and brings together engineers, creative technologists, artists, designers and researchers to engage in a future-oriented debate about their diverse collaborations. The submission process is open until 28 June, 2024.

colors.subtitle: What are the tools of the future that we really need?
How do we want to live together?
What kinds of solutions and spaces do we want?
